taxonomy: Xiphopteris setulifera is a species of fern, specifically belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Within the class Polypodiopsida, it is part of the subclass Polypodiidae. Further classification places Xiphopteris setulifera within the order Polypodiales and the suborder Polypodiineae. Its genus, Xiphopteris, is part of the subfamily Polypodioideae. This comprehensive classification helps in understanding the relationships between Xiphopteris setulifera and other fern species.
